title: Medical journal fake self-citation letter with direct Springer retraction notice
why_interesting: Direct publisher notice ties one research-integrity row to unverifiable references, peer-review-policy failure, and author-stated generative-AI reference conversion.
what_still_needs_checking: Assign final reviewed-case slot or keep as paper source-depth anchor; ensure caption language uses notice-bounded wording.
claim_ceiling: No prevalence, intent, misconduct, or cross-publisher conclusion.

title: Springer ML book made-up citations with direct chapter-PDF retraction notice
why_interesting: Direct Springer-originating notice states reference-validity concerns and inability to verify 25 of 46 references.
what_still_needs_checking: Keep as comparator unless a non-Springer direct notice is added.
claim_ceiling: No generative-AI causation, intent, or publisher-practice conclusion unless a direct source states it.

title: FTC final order and complaint package on DoNotPay AI-lawyer and robot-lawyer claims
why_interesting: Strongest non-finance official AI-claim exemplar for legal-service substitution / robot-lawyer marketing claims.
what_still_needs_checking: Decide whether paper needs sidecar promotion or appendix-only use; keep complaint/order posture split.
claim_ceiling: FTC document posture only; no unauthorized-practice finding, judicial merits finding, or prevalence claim.

title: FTC final order and complaint package on Workado / Content at Scale AI detector accuracy claims
why_interesting: Official detector-accuracy advertising package bridges AI-washing, education, and research-integrity caution.
what_still_needs_checking: Decide whether detector-governance branch is opened deliberately; keep lower priority than DoNotPay for first non-finance slot.
claim_ceiling: No general detector-validity verdict, prevalence claim, or scientific conclusion beyond FTC wording.
